calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jul-01-2019 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-27-2019 Off Calendar

Attorney Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel For Plaintiff
Off Calendar Apr-17-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Haitham G. Amin, Esq., Amin Law, 415-735-4774, counsel for Plaintiff, seeking relief as plaintiffs counsel;
Arielle Koors accompanied by her husband Thomas Koors, apppearing on her behalf as Plaintiff;

The Court address parties present and states the need to hold an In Camera Review for this motion. The matter is passed at 10:25 a.m. and is to be heard after all other motions have been heard.

Matter is recalled at 10:50 a.m.

In Camera Review is held. (As fully reported in the Court Reporters transcripts.)

Haitham G. Amin's Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel For Plaintiff is granted.

Order is signed. The Court rules the transcript for today's hearing is considered sealed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: W. Trupek, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano CSR#8600 email maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/EPS)

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Apr-11-2019 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-05-2018 Set For Trial On Jul-15-19 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
